title: Backported Clouds
description: A resource pack that backports the new clouds from 25w21a
body:
![Backported Clouds](https://i.postimg.cc/jdGh0fph/backportedclouds.png)

**Backported Clouds** is a resource pack that simply backports the new clean and modernized 1.21.6 (25w21a snapshot) clouds to older versions like Minecraft 1.13-1.21.5!

## Features

Backport of Minecraft 1.21.6's new and clean clouds!
Available for versions 1.13-1.21.5

## Usage & License

Assets such as custom; structures, textures, models, music, titles, icons, and logos are property of MarbledHubb Studios. All Rights Reserved. 
You may use this in your video, no credit required but it would be appreciated.
The clouds texture are property of Mojang Studios, licensed All Rights Reserved.

**MarbledHubb Studios** is proudly partnered with **[BisectHosting](https://bisecthosting.com/marbledhubb?r=Modrinth)**! When using our code "**marbledhubb**", you are saving 25% off any gaming server while supporting us by commission, supporting the development of our packs!
